message:
refactor(mux): migrate web client from vanilla TS to Svelte 5

- Replace monolithic index.ts with Svelte component architecture
- Add App.svelte as main entry with reactive menu definitions
- Create reusable components: Menu, TabBar, StatusDot, CommandPalette,
  QuickTerminal, TabOverview, Panel
- Implement submenu support in Menu component for Select/Resize Split
- Add Svelte stores for tabs and connection status
- Migrate Panel class to Panel.svelte with stats overlay
- Update mux.ts to use Svelte mount/unmount for panels
- Add PanelLike interface in split-container.ts for type safety
- Configure Vite + Svelte build pipeline
- Remove old panel.ts and index.ts files

files.patch:
@@ -3,15 +3,18 @@
   "version": "0.1.0",
   "type": "module",
   "scripts": {
-    "build": "bun build src/index.ts --outfile=client.js --minify --format=iife",
-    "build:dev": "bun build src/index.ts --outfile=client.js --format=iife",
-    "dev": "bun build src/index.ts --outfile=client.js --watch --format=iife",
+    "build": "vite build",
+    "build:legacy": "bun build src/index.ts --outfile=client.js --minify --format=iife",
+    "dev": "vite build --watch",
     "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"
   },
